word: G5053 - τελευτάω - teleutáō - tel-yoo-tah'-o - Be dead

sections.paragraph:
- Original: τελευτάω

- Transliteration: Teleutao

- Phonetic: tel-yoo-tah'-o

- Definition:

1. to finish, bring to and end, close

2. to have an end or close, come to an end

- Origin: from a presumed derivative of G5055

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From a presumed derivative of G5055; to finish life (by implication of G979) that is expire (demise): - be dead decease die.
